name: Chicken Tonnato D'este
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 cups of chicken stock to a boil in a covered saucepan.
2. Poach the chicken breasts for 15 minutes and allow them to cool in the stock.
3. For the tonnato sauce, combine mayonnaise, white wine, 1/2 cup of chicken stock, anchovies, oil from anchovies, tuna, lemon juice, and oregano in a blender or food processor. Blend until well mixed.
4. Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Remove bones from the chicken breasts and cut into 1-inch thick slices.
6. Arrange the sliced chicken on a serving platter so that they overlap slightly.
7. Pour the tonnato sauce over all the chicken pieces.
8. Sprinkle capers, parsley, and lemon slices on top.
9. Serve cold or at room temperature.
